title: Guillque's Enhanced Potions
body:
# **Make your brewing shelf fancier !**

**Guillque's Enhanced Potions** gives custom textures to potions based on their effects and modifications.

The **cork** changes material depending on the potion type:
- **Base Potion**: Standard cork
- **Strong potion** : Glowstone cork
- **Long potion** : Redstone cork

Potions also come in three different shapes according to their effects:
- **Health-related effects**: Round bottles
- **Movement effects (legs and/or arms)**: Triangular bottles
- **Other effects**: Rectangular bottles

Depending on whether a potion has positive or negative effects, it will appear in either clear glass or tinted glass — giving you better visibility of harmful brews!

 

Need a CIT mod to work, such as [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) or Optifine.
